title: Senior Network & Systems Administrator
summary: Own the full network and server stack for an 850-employee organisation — from edge firewalls down to the Linux and Windows boxes running line-of-business apps.
highlights: Designed, deployed and manage the full enterprise network for 850 employees — Cisco ISR routers, Catalyst multilayer switches, and FortiGate / Cisco ASA NGFW in a 3-tier hierarchical architecture.
Engineered 8+ department-wise VLANs (HR, Finance, Engineering, IT, Executive, Guest) with 802.1Q trunking, inter-VLAN routing, and ACL-based security policies.
Configured OSPF dynamic routing across all segments; implemented EtherChannel (LACP) and RSTP for zero-downtime failover.
Deployed site-to-site IPSec VPN and SSL remote-access VPN for 100+ remote workers with MFA enforcement.
Administer Windows Server 2019/2022 — Active Directory, Group Policy, DNS, DHCP, IIS — maintaining 99.9% uptime.
Manage Hyper-V, consolidating 12 physical servers and cutting hardware costs by ~30%.
Automate admin tasks with PowerShell and Bash, saving ~15 hours/month.
Built internal web applications with JavaScript, React, Next.js, Go and PostgreSQL, self-hosted on Ubuntu Linux.

title: IT & System Administrator
summary: Frontline IT and infrastructure support across multiple retail locations — networks, servers, security systems and end-user support.
highlights: Maintained and monitored security systems, networks and servers across multiple retail locations.
Administered Google Workspace for user/device management, access control and license governance.
Managed Windows Server infrastructure — Active Directory, OS updates, backups and network printers.
Provided Tier 1/2 technical support and ERP application incident management.
